name: @minhchi1509/facebook-profile-cleaner
description: Clean your Facebook profile by removing all posts, comments, likes, and reactions, following, sent friend requests, and more...

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && rollup -c rollup.config.ts --configPlugin typescript && npm run build:dts-export
scripts.publish:patch: npm run build && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:minor: npm run build && npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:major: npm run build && npm version major --no-git-tag-version && npm publish --access public

author: minhchi1509
